name: PLNCLOSEUPDSH
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[PLNCLOSEUPDSH] ON [dbo].[SIPARISHAREKETLERI]
FOR UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @SD_REF AS INT
DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
SELECT D.SD_REF FROM DELETED D,INSERTED I WHERE I.SD_REF=D.SD_REF AND I.KAPALI=1 AND D.KAPALI=0  GROUP BY D.SD_REF
OPEN Dcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
INTO @SD_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE STATUS=0 AND SD_REF=@SD_REF
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
INTO @SD_REF;
END  
CLOSE Dcur;  
DEALLOCATE Dcur;
